prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: Her Silent Christmas Alibi
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Mother Was Right All Along
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Some homes hold families. Some hold motive.
Omen: phone static saying her name
Relationship dynamic: unresolved hometown romance
Props: ceramic owl, scarf with impossible timing, snow globe

Cast:
- Cole Cross | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.18 | space=storage unit described as seasonal materials | secrets=has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Claire Cross | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=attorney with no visible clients | threat_aura=0.34 | space=toolshed described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=moved money during a family emergency
- Tess Lark | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=real estate agent | threat_aura=0.63 | space=old family office described as donation overflow | secrets=may die first or survive unbelievably
- Evelyn Bell | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=therapist | threat_aura=0.87 | space=storage unit described as old family things | secrets=inherited documents she should have burned
- Elias Dane | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=hardware store owner | threat_aura=0.38 | space=side room with a space heater and old family records | secrets=ignored a warning text on the worst possible night; knows where evidence should have been
- Mara Bennett | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=boutique owner | threat_aura=0.42 | space=church basement described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts; accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Mara Lark | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Gavin Bennett | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Claire Cross is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Cole Cross says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Blackthorn Lake.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Claire?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Mara. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Cole. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The ceramic owl is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Evelyn."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."

Write an expansion JSON object with exactly these keys:
- expanded_synopsis: string, 180-320 words
- scene_paragraphs: array of 6 strings, each 90-180 words, representing juicy HallTime scene expansion
